description: Generate a complete ChIP-seq analysis workflow bash script: normalized coverage tracks (bamCoverage RPGC), log2 ratio track (bamCompare), signal matrix around TSS (computeMatrix), heatmap (plotHeatmap), profile (plotProfile), and enrichment at peaks (plotEnrichment).
rules: read-only — emits a bash script template; never runs deepTools or touches sequencing data
INPUT_BAM = control BAM, CHIP_BAM = single ChIP BAM, GENES_BED = TSS regions, PEAKS_BED = peak regions
all vars optional — unset ones use the generator's safe defaults
filenames are sanitized (no shell metacharacters, no '..' segments) before interpolation
usage: Optionally set INPUT_BAM, CHIP_BAM, GENES_BED, PEAKS_BED, GENOME_SIZE, THREADS. Output: chipseq_analysis.sh (a customizable bash workflow to review and run separately).
limitation: Produces a template script only. Running it requires deepTools 3.5.6 installed. Paths must satisfy the sanitizer pattern [A-Za-z0-9._/-]. The peaks step is skipped at runtime if PEAKS_BED does not exist.
